CustomField.formula: CASE( Product_Line__c , 'TV','TV', 'BG-Others','BG-Others', 'Laser TV','LTV', 'Commercial display','Commercial display', 'MP','MP', 'Sound Bar','Soundbar', 'Other','Other', 'Medical utltrasound','Medical utltrasound', 'Smart City','Smart City', 'AC','AC', 'Refrigerator','REF', 'Freezer','FZ', 'WM','WM', 'Small Domestic Home Appliances','SDA', 'LCAC','CAC', 'Hitachi Commercial AC','Hitachi CAC', 'WineCabi','WineCabi', 'Cooking','Cooking', 'Dishwasher','DW', 'CF','CF', 'HeatPump','HeatPump', '')
CustomField.label: Product Line Name
